linkMessage(bytes32,uint32,bytes32).notice: Hash the caller must sign off-chain for registerWallet.

registerWallet(uint32,bytes32,bytes).notice: Register an external-chain wallet as belonging to the caller.         `signature` must be a signature over         keccak256("PolkaCredit link" || popId || chainId || addressBytes)         produced by the external key.
